Title: User successfully logs in with correct credentials
Preconditions: User has registered and stored credentials in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" as username and "testpassword" as password.
2. Application dispatches credentials to the server.
3. Server verifies credentials against the database.
4. Server confirms credentials match.
5. Application logs in the user.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: User fails to log in with incorrect credentials
Preconditions: User has registered but entered incorrect credentials.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" as username and "wrongpassword" as password.
2. Application dispatches credentials to the server.
3. Server verifies credentials against the database.
4. Server confirms credentials do not match.
5. Application displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User successfully registers with valid data
Preconditions: User has not registered yet.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates registration.
2. System prompts for username and password.
3. User enters "newuser" as username and "newpassword" as password.
4. System stores the data in the database.
5. System redirects user to the home page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page after successful registration.

Title: User fails to register with invalid data
Preconditions: User attempts to register with invalid data.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates registration.
2. System prompts for username and password.
3. User leaves both fields empty.
4. System displays an error message.
Expected Result: User is shown an error message indicating required fields are missing.

Title: User starts a course and ends it without calculating emissions
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to start a course.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the course.
2. System starts the course.
3. User ends the course.
4. System ends the course.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page after ending the course.

Title: User starts a course and calculates emissions
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to start a course.
Test Steps:
1. User initiates the course.
2. System starts the course.
3. System calculates emissions.
4. User ends the course.
5. System ends the course.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page after ending the course with emissions calculated.

Title: User views weekly report and navigates to the menu
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to view the report.
Test Steps:
1. User views the weekly report.
2. System prompts for navigation to the menu.
3. User navigates to the menu.
4. System displays the menu options.
Expected Result: User is shown the menu options after viewing the report.

Title: User views weekly report and exits without navigating to the menu
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to view the report.
Test Steps:
1. User views the weekly report.
2. System prompts for navigation to the menu.
3. User exits without navigating to the menu.
Expected Result: User remains on the report page.

Title: User updates personal data and returns to the report
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to update personal data.
Test Steps:
1. User updates personal data.
2. System prompts for menu navigation.
3. User navigates to the report.
4. System displays the updated report.
Expected Result: User is shown the updated report after returning to the report page.

Title: User updates personal data and exits without navigating to the report
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to update personal data.
Test Steps:
1. User updates personal data.
2. System prompts for menu navigation.
3. User exits without navigating to the report.
Expected Result: User remains on the data update page.

Title: User repeatedly updates personal data
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to update personal data.
Test Steps:
1. User updates personal data.
2. System prompts for menu navigation.
3. User updates personal data again.
4. System prompts for menu navigation.
5. User navigates to the report.
6. System displays the updated report.
Expected Result: User is shown the updated report after navigating to the report page.

Title: User repeatedly updates personal data and exits without navigating to the report
Preconditions: User is logged in and ready to update personal data.
Test Steps:
1. User updates personal data.
2. System prompts for menu navigation.
3. User updates personal data again.
4. System prompts for menu navigation.
5. User exits without navigating to the report.
Expected Result: User remains on the data update page.
